item.title: clawhq install — pre-req detection + scaffold
item.intent: Make 'clawhq install' the first command that works — detect prerequisites, scaffold ~/.clawhq/, and leave the user with clear next-step guidance.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: This is the literal first command a user runs. Gate: Docker detected, Node >=20, Ollama running. Creates ~/.clawhq/ scaffold. Without this, nothing else works. Acceptance: 'clawhq install' exits 0, ~/.clawhq/ structure exists, clawhq.yaml written, user sees next-step guidance.
steps: Write initial clawhq.yaml with sensible defaults
Display clear next-step guidance on success
acceptanceCriteria: User sees clear next-step guidance after install
